violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary when putting on gloves.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. A prep cooler has a constant temperature of 42 F.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The walk in freezer is icing up on the outside of the door and is not able to latch closed.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. Single use cardboard being used as a shelf liner in a coke cooler in the kitchen.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary when changing tasks.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed a bag of sugar stored on the floor.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The ice machine has a build up of scale and needs to be deep cleaned.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. Observed cardboard being used as a liner in the salad cooler.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Observed sauce containers being washed in the big handwash sink in the kitchen.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Maintenance equipment, supplies and tools were not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Observed drywall tape stored on a shelf above the prep counter.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Appropriate procedures (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
